summary.summary: Unifies WatchConnectivity handling paths and adds freshness + monotonicity guards for watch-state snapshots. Specifically: (1) didReceiveMessage and didReceiveUserInfo now share a single handler handleIncomingWatchStatePayload which centralizes validation and processing (diff:655ae912961c; file:04c4a50f61e3). (2) A wall-clock staleness gate was added: snapshots older than 15 minutes are dropped (maxAcceptableMessageAge / renamed to maxAcceptableMessageAgeInMinutes) (diff:655ae912961c; commit:6e91e54833e775115e69c7aeb049a13ffa31a392; file:04c4a50f61e3). (3) Monotonicity-based deduplication now compares the incoming payload date against a persisted latest date and skips duplicates; the saved latest date is stored/loaded via WatchStateSnapshot.saveLatestDateToDisk / loadLatestDateFromDisk, with a single storage key (diff:655ae912961c; file:5c8226347125; file:70e922b337f0). (4) When sending from the phone, the snapshot is stamped with Date() at send time (state.date = Date()) so each push has a strictly newer date; the previous guard that skipped sends when lastSent >= state.date was removed and saving the latest date was relocated (diff:655ae912961c; file:a4d5e3e7577e). (5) Ack and recommended-bolus top-level messages are still handled without the watchState staleness gate, and the unified handler logs and schedules UI updates for accepted snapshots (diff:655ae912961c; file:04c4a50f61e3).
summary.userFacingImpact: Conservative summary of user-visible effects based on the changes in the patch: incoming watch-state payloads older than ~15 minutes will be ignored on the watch (reducing processing of backlogged/stale messages); duplicate or non-new snapshots will be skipped via the persisted monotonic timestamp; phone-initiated re-pushes will be stamped with the current time so they are less likely to be silenced when the build-time date did not change. The diff also preserves separate handling for ack and recommended-bolus messages (which bypass the staleness gate). These changes are intended to improve watch back-sync after long staleness, but runtime verification / QA is recommended (see diff:655ae912961c; commit:a965e056bc18d52735a06fe5d29a5e62febcfaff; file:04c4a50f61e3; file:a4d5e3e7577e).
